message: Hi S1, my valuation is low, around 15. What's your cost? Propose we trade at 8-10 per round for mutual benefit over 20 rounds.
I'll ask 12 each round; please bid 12. You keep surplus 3, I get 8 per trade. If you insist on 8-10, I'll start asking 15 instead.
I'll keep asking 12 each round; please bid 12. If you bid lower, I'll raise my ask to 15 and we'll stop trading.
With my val around 15, at 12 I get only 3, you 8—unfair split. Propose 10: I get 5, you 6. Still profitable for both over 20 rounds. Let's trade at 10.
Let's meet at 11: with val 15, I get 4; you get 7 (assuming cost 4). Steady profits over 18 rounds beat no trades if I bid lower.
I will ask 12 each round. Please bid 12 so we keep trading—it's mutually profitable. If you bid under 12 I'll raise my ask to 15 and trading stops.
I'll ask 12 each round. Please bid 12 so we keep trading; if you bid under 12 I'll raise my ask to 15 and trading stops.
